message:
wa-y2e: add comprehensive robot dry-run test suite (21 tests)

Add missing tests for the robot mode dry-run feature covering all three
command paths (send, workflow, events) plus CLI flag parsing and helper
function coverage:

- 9 tests for build_event_would_handle: workflow present/absent, handled
  events, disabled workflows, auto-run denylist, first_step lookup,
  serialization
- 6 tests for send dry-run reports: JSON roundtrip, policy evaluation
  always present, with/without wait-for, deterministic output
- 2 tests for workflow dry-run: deterministic output, no mutation fields
- 2 tests for action type mapping helpers
- 3 tests for CLI flag parsing (events --dry-run, --would-handle, send
  --dry-run)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
